---
title: "Mrs Cazenove"
---

## Mrs Cazenove

### Description

mentioned (12 April 1894)

### Biography

This person was perhaps the recently widowed Barbara Constantia Thomson (d. 11 April 1905), who had married (20 October 1853) Henry Cazenove  (25 May 1829-6 April 1894)of Lilies, Aylesbury.  Her two daughters were Edith Constance (1855-1937) who married (24 June 1880) William Musgrave of Wroughton (d. 29  Dec 1828) and Alice Mary (d. 1944) who married 1883 Captain William Frederic Duff Schreiber.  The father was first cousin to [[person:274]Annie Cazenove]\'s father. [LG Cazenove; LG Wroughton of Woolley Park]

### Letters

- Letter from April 12, 1894.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
